subject: Accounting
title: Adjusting Entries
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Adjusting Entries.

hook.text: Rent paid in advance, salaries earned but not yet paid—these need adjusting entries.

buildup.text: Adjusting entries update accounts so statements reflect the true financial position.

discovery.text: They handle accruals (earned but unpaid) and deferrals (paid but not yet earned).

twist.text: Skip adjustments and a company might report income it hasn't earned or miss expenses it owes.

climax.text: These entries enforce the matching and accrual principles before reports go out.

quiz.question: What is the purpose of adjusting entries?
options: To update accounts at period end
